titleZh: 《德国公司法的发展：至 1990 年的历史再评估》
titleEn: The Development of German Corporate Law Until 1990: An Historical Reappraisal
publisher: German Law Journal / Cambridge University Press
abstractZh: 该文从历史维度梳理德国现代公司法的形成脉络，适合作为理解 Aktiengesetz、GmbHG 与治理结构背景的入门文章。
abstractEn: A historical reappraisal of the formation of modern German corporate law, useful as an introductory guide to the AktG, GmbHG, and the broader governance framework.
